iotwireless.fuotatask.AssociateMulticast.Docs: The ID of the multicast group to associate with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.AssociateWirelessD.Docs: The ID of the wireless device to associate with a multicast group.

iotwireless.fuotatask.Description.Docs: The description of the new resource.

iotwireless.fuotatask.DisassociateMultic.Docs: The ID of the multicast group to disassociate from a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.DisassociateWirele.Docs: The ID of the wireless device to disassociate from a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.FirmwareUpdateImag.Docs: The S3 URI points to a firmware update image that is to be used with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.FirmwareUpdateRole.Docs: The firmware update role that is to be used with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.LoRaWAN.Docs: The LoRaWAN information used with a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.Name.Docs: The name of a FUOTA task.

iotwireless.fuotatask.Tags.Docs: The tags are an array of key-value pairs to attach to the specified resource. Tags can have a minimum of 0 and a maximum of 50 items.
